name: Old Fashioned Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cans (8 1/2 oz) sliced pineapple in syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Drain pineapple slices and reserve 2 tablespoons of syrup.
3. Melt butter in a heavy cast iron frying pan over medium heat.
4. Add brown sugar and stir until melted. Remove from heat.
5. Arrange 8 pineapple slices around the edge, overlapping slightly, with one slice in the center.
6. Place walnut or pecan halves in the center of each slice.
7. Surround the inside edge of the skillet with remaining pineapple cut into halves.
8. In a medium bowl, mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
9. Add shortening and milk; beat until smooth.
10. Add egg and reserved syrup; beat again.
11. Pour batter over pineapple.
12. Bake for 40-45 minutes or until cake springs back to touch.
13. Let cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes, then loosen edges with a spatula.
14. Place serving platter over the skillet and invert gently.
15. Serve with whipped heavy cream.
